text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp season has come again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Is it that time of year again?
choice_data_list: Be sure to take care of your health this time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I don't have time to collapse. More
importantly...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm different now than I was then. You're different
than you were too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I understand about Biwa Hayahide. I'll let
the president know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just you, Brian. You should know better
than to sneak up on people...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You haven't heard even though she's your sister?
She said she'll join us partway through camp this
year.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It has to do with her comprehensive physical...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Just forget I said anything. If you haven't heard,
it probably isn't that important.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You should just concentrate on summer camp. I'm
sure that's what your sister wants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus, our senior year summer camp begins.
